message:
feat(fp-frame): add DataFrame.size property parity (frankenpandas-wvbi)

Adds DataFrame::size returning rows × columns — the total cell
count, matching pd.DataFrame.size. Useful alongside the new
Series::size so callers can write size-generic code.

Zero-row or zero-column frames return 0 regardless of the other
axis (pandas semantic).

Two tests: non-trivial size (2×3 → 6) and zero-size on both
zero-row and zero-column paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
